name: Privanet Group Oyj
summary: Privanet Group Oyj, an investment services company, specializing in the brokerage of unlisted corporate securities in Finland. The company offers a service to trade in over-the-counter securities; and company reports on its portfolio companies, and news feeds from portfolio companies on its website. Privanet Group Oyj was founded in 2000 and is based in Helsinki, Finland.
